sentences.text: Thank you for calling management to help prevent the spread of the coronavirus gallon management staff will be working from home. Please listen as our menu has changed. For any other issues, please leave a voicemail or email receptionist at dot com. All voicemails left on our main line, as well as voicemails left in the mail boxes of individual staff will be returned for a directory listing of staff, please press Pound.
